Dear Mrs Burlingame

Thank you very much for your prompt responses and for confirming your selections following our last report. I am pleased to acknowledge all of your decisions below and to provide you with a full update on today's site progress.

Works continue to advance well across all areas of the flat and we remain on programme.

01 Bathroom
Floor Tiles
Complete

The bathroom floor tiling has been completed today. Tiles have been laid to a full bond pattern with consistent joints and the floor is now curing prior to grouting.

Bathroom floor — tiles laid and curing, 10 March 2026
Proposed Basin
For Reference

Please find below the proposed counter-top vessel basin for the bathroom vanity unit. This round ceramic bowl basin (410mm diameter, 175mm height) with central overflow will sit beautifully on the marble vanity top as shown in the design reference further below.

Proposed ceramic vessel basin
Technical drawing — all dimensions in mm

02 Window Works
PVC Window Finishing
Fitted

The PVC finishing trims to the window have been fitted, providing a clean and precise finish to the window reveals ahead of the final decoration stage.

Window — PVC finishing fitted, 10 March 2026
Broken Glass Panel
Prices Pending

The broken glass panel has been safely removed and the opening temporarily boarded to keep the flat secure and weathertight. We are obtaining replacement prices from our glazing suppliers and will revert to you with a full cost to supply and fit as soon as quotations are received.

Window — glass removed, temporary board in place, 10 March 2026
Window Fan
Removed

The existing window-mounted fan unit (Vent-Axia VA100LT) has been removed. As shown in the photograph below, the unit was heavily soiled and no longer functional. We will source a suitable manual ventilation grille as a replacement and confirm specification and cost to you shortly.

Vent-Axia VA100LT window fan — removed, 10 March 2026
03 Electrical Works
TV Positions & Aerial Signal
Tested & Working

Both new TV socket positions have been tested today. Mains power supply and TV aerial signal are confirmed working correctly at both locations. The new high-grade cable run is performing as expected.

✓ Both TV positions confirmed live — power and aerial signal tested and working at the living room position and the bedroom position.
Light Fittings — Safety Issue
Action Required

During our works today we carried out a full inspection of all light fittings throughout the flat. This has identified two significant safety matters that must be addressed:

⚠ Safety — Action Required
1. No earthing to any light fitting. None of the existing light fittings carry an earth connection. This is a fundamental electrical safety requirement under current wiring regulations and must be rectified.

2. No fire-rated downlights. None of the recessed downlights are fire-rated. Building regulations require fire-rated fittings in ceilings to maintain the integrity of the fire barrier between floors.

We are currently obtaining prices from suppliers for replacement fire-rated, fully earthed fittings throughout the flat and will provide a full cost breakdown shortly. Photographs showing the current conditions are included below for your records.

Light wiring — no earth connection present
Existing downlight — not fire-rated
Pendant — taped connector, no earth
Bathroom ceiling — pending fire-rated replacement
Living room — lights pending replacement
Bedroom — lights pending replacement
